case_title: GOLD, HEATHER VS VOLDENG, LISA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY GOLD, HEATHER AS TO DEFENDANT VOLDENG, LISA UBERBABE MEDIA INC. DIGTAL MOGUL KLOPPENBERG, LAURA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KLOPPENBERG, LAURA
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIGTAL MOGUL
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UBERBABE MEDIA INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VOLDENG, LISA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLD, HEATHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOLDENG, LISA UBERBABE MEDIA INC. DIGTAL MOGUL KLOPPENBERG, LAURA $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,045.00, LISA VOLDENG, DIGITAL MOGUL AND LAURA KLOPPENBERG ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. UBERBABE MEDIA IS AMENDED TO UBERBABE MEDIA INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT UBERBABE MEDIA INC. HEARING SET FOR SEP-24-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF SEP-24-2001, GRANTED
UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID.
